I wanted to see how far I could push the "single file" approach. Each app:
- Single HTML file (HTML + CSS + JS inline)
- Under 80KB total
- Tailwind CSS via CDN (no build step)
- Inter font via Google Fonts
- All data in localStorage
- Full PWA: service worker, manifest. #nocode

**The 7 apps:**
- Sleep tracker (vanilla CSS, dark theme)
- Pomodoro timer (ambient sounds via Web Audio API)
- Habit tracker (heatmap calendar, streak celebrations)
- Meal planner (weekly grid, recipe library, macro tracking)
- Walking gamification (progress ring, achievement...

**What worked:**
- Tailwind CDN removes ALL build complexity
- localStorage is fine for personal data apps
- PWA install gives a native feel for free
- No backend = no hosting costs = Vercel free tier forever
- OG tags + Twitter cards for sharing #saas #indiehackers
